## Source: amazon-inspector (1644f08d12a97a4daeeca3e4195d91585bdbe1a8c2085fa918a92427cf1ee99f)
The package @3stripes/api-client was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (a25a3f6f0b4ff00af8eca4dcea0bfdb698f071423a6b30b1b62a440b71137688)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified '@3stripes/api-client' @ 999.0.2 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.
